### Post by graabein on 2007-04-29
Hi, I get this message when I run both **glxgears** and **glxinfo**:

```
Error: glXCreateContext failed
```

I had it working before I set up two X screens and I think I also removed some old XGL/Compiz stuff. 

Anyone know what to do? I would like to give Beryl another try. 

Here is my *xorg.conf*:

```
# nvidia-settings: X configuration file generated by nvidia-settings

Section "ServerLayout"
    Identifier     "Layout0"
```

### Post by graabein on 2007-05-15
So noone's running Compiz/Beryl on two different X screens?

---

### Post by Xavier_Idefix on 2008-05-23
I got this message too.
I have one solution.
Uninstall your video driver, and reinstall it.

It works with my PC (Ubuntu Hardy) with NVidia 7600GS Video card. :cool:

---
